How It Works

Three steps.
Then just watch.

Vicatus runs the numbers. You commit to them.

1

Create Your Profile

Sign up and answer a few quick questions. Takes less than two minutes.

2

Input your current weight and desired weight. Vicatus calculates your precise daily targets and timeline â€” scientifically.

3

Log meals, move your body, check your dashboard. Every hour. Every day.
